case_title: KEYHAN MOHANNA VS. R. PAUL MCCLOSKEY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SC-105 "ANSWER" RECEIVED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOHANNA, KEYHAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED AUG-03-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLOSKEY, R. PAUL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOHANNA, KEYHAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCCLOSKEY, R. PAUL PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH HIS CLAIM FOR DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCLOSKEY, R. PAUL
(SC-105A) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER WAS RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MOHANNA, KEYHAN AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLOSKEY, R. PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST IS DENIED. THE REQUEST SEEKS RELIEF BEYOND THAT AT ISSUE IN THIS SMALL CLAIMS CASE.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
